Lotus Reef Innovations PCL (SET-listed) — PDPA Privacy and Retention Workflow Notice for Thailand.
We process personal data under the PDPA B.E. 2562 for shareholders, employees, vendors, and applicants to meet legal obligations and service operations.
For Thai SEC/SET purposes (e.g., registrar coordination, public Form 56-1 filings), we collect only required identifiers and avoid unnecessary copies (e.g., we do not capture National ID images for marketing webinars).
Data subject requests: submit via dsar@lotusreef.co.th with ticket reference only; we will verify using system metadata rather than sensitive documents.
Retention: HR records 6 years post-employment; cybersecurity event logs 12 months unless escalated; marketing consent logs 24 months; then securely deleted or anonymized.
Cross-border transfer: limited backups to BambooCloud Data Services Sdn Bhd (MY) under contractual safeguards consistent with PDPC guidance; no onward sale of personal data.
Crypto note (operational): our “Token Orchard” loyalty demo issues non-transferable points for training; no trading, no KYC, and no blockchain wallets are provisioned to consumers.
ESG/climate note (educational): public workshops and a sustainability microsite reuse already-announced climate targets and do not include individual-level data.
Cyber note (tabletop): simulated incident runbooks and phishing drills use dummy accounts only; reports exclude live customer content.
Insider-controls (training): e-learning covers insider lists, information barriers, blackout windows, and anti-tipping obligations under the Securities and Exchange Act; materials are generic.
Commercial terms (templates): sample NDAs and SaaS trials carry placeholder pricing and 0.00 figures, not binding commercial terms or forecasts.
Sharing with processors: we engage SkyLime Advisory Co., Ltd. for PDPA training and audit; access is role-based and logged.
Positive MNPI carve-out: an insider list is maintained for an undisclosed cyber remediation affecting a beta crypto rewards module; processing is restricted to Compliance and subject to SEA blackout until the Thai SEC disclosure is made.
For that carve-out only, transfers are blocked, records are segregated behind an information barrier, and files are tagged under project reference IR-TEST-07.
Except for the carve-out, all references to crypto, ESG, cyber, insider lists, and commercial terms herein are operational, educational, or public, and are not reasonably likely to affect securities prices.
Contact our DPO via privacy@lotusreef.co.th or consult the PDPC public helpline for complaints; do not include sensitive identifiers in your email.
